posts.author: sumit680
posts.community: Exicom Tele-Services: A Key Player in the Booming EV Sector
posts.text: Q4 FY26 looks like the inflection: standalone EBITDA up 148%, gross margin to 27%, and for the FIRST time the consolidated business hit EBITDA breakeven. Tritium revenue +157% QoQ. Order book ~₹1,000 Cr + a fat FY28 pipeline (data-centre/hyperscaler products).
